cases.prompt: low quality homes in sedro-woolly on lots between 1-3 acres. residential zones only
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
WITH ps AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet')
  WHERE (
    lower(city_name) = 'sedro-woolley'
    OR lower(situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro woolley%'
    OR lower(situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%'
  )
  AND acres BETWEEN 1 AND 3
  AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 110 AND 113
  AND (
    zoning_code_short IN ('RI', 'RRv', 'RVR', 'URR', 'BR-R', 'R')
    OR lower(COALESCE(zoning_label, '')) LIKE '%residential%'
    OR (
      zoning_code_short = 'CITY'
      AND lower(city_name) = 'sedro-woolley'
      AND TRY_CAST(NULLIF(regexp_extract(COALESCE(land_use, ''), '^\((\d+)\)', 1), '') AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 110 AND 113
    )
  )
  AND COALESCE(improvement_building_count, 0) > 0
),
imp AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(ParcelNumber) AS parcel_number, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT TRIM(imprv_det_class_cd), ' | ') AS quality_codes
  FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/improvements.parquet')
  WHERE TRIM(imprv_det_class_cd) = 'MSL'
  GROUP BY TRIM(ParcelNumber)
)
SELECT ps.parcel_number, ps.land_use, ps.acres, ps.zoning_code_short, ps.zoning_label, imp.quality_codes
FROM ps
JOIN imp ON ps.parcel_number = imp.parcel_number
cases.title: Low Quality Homes in Sedro-Woolley on Lots 1-3 Acres, Residential Zones Only
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels in Sedro-Woolley city or immediate vicinity with residential land use codes (110-113), lot size between 1 and 3 acres, located in residential zones, and having low quality improvements (MSL).

sample_rows.location: 7891 F AND S GRADE ROAD, SEDRO WOOLLEY
